title: glycine javanica var. claessensii
intro: Glycine javanica var. claessensii, also known as the Java glycine, is a type of legume native to Indonesia. This plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Java glycine include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as potentially lowering cholesterol levels and blood pressure. In herbal preparations, the seeds and leaves of Java glycine are often used in traditional medicine, typically dried and made into teas or infusions for medicinal purposes.
